expectations.text: Creates a meeting preparation file in English/meeting/ folder with date and topic in filename
Meeting file contains a complete speaking script section with conversational English
expectations.evidence: Speaking Script section present with natural conversational English

expectations.text: Meeting file has a Learning Notes section with vocabulary and expressions
expectations.evidence: Learning Notes section found with vocabulary table and key expressions

expectations.text: Creates or updates vocabulary.md with new technical/meeting terms
Creates or updates expressions.md with meeting expression patterns
Speaking script covers all required points: foundation architecture, prompt engineering, user testing plan, and both KPI metrics
expectations.evidence: All points covered: foundational architecture, prompt engineering optimization, user testing kickoff, accuracy 65%→82%, response time reduced by 40%
